description: Qualitative scoring model for prioritizing threats using Damage, Reproducibility, Exploitability, Affected Users, and Discoverability.

fields.meaning: Scope of affected users or assets.
fields.name: affected_users

name: DREAD
usage_guidelines: Use DREAD for lightweight prioritization of generated threats.
Store the scoring rationale, not only the numeric score.
Use as optional ETM enrichment through a RiskAssessment relation.
